description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a deep reddish-brown wooden stock accented by metallic gold and brass components. The stock is robust and appears reinforced, with a thumbhole design and metallic bands for added strength and style. The receiver and magazine area are constructed from metal, with visible mechanical details and a detachable box magazine. The barrel is straight and elongated, with metallic fittings and a simple iron sight system mounted on top. The muzzle end is unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or muzzle brake. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern mechanical elements, making it visually striking and functional.
description: A long rifle with a reddish-brown wooden stock, gold and brass metal accents, and a detachable box magazine. The design combines traditional woodwork with modern metallic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock's thumbhole design and the metallic magazine area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
